overall.description: A red off-road vehicle drives across a bright, snowy landscape in a video game. The camera follows from a third-person perspective as the vehicle navigates the white terrain, transitioning from a rear view to a side profile as the vehicle turns.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: driving the red off-road vehicle forward across the flat snowy terrain in a straight line

entered.detail: expansive white snow field stretching to the horizon with high reflectivity
dark geometric rock formation partially buried in snow on the left side of the field

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person rear view of a red off-road vehicle driving across a vast, bright snow field. The terrain is flat and white with minimal features except for a dark rock formation visible on the left side. The vehicle moves steadily forward, casting a shadow on the snow, with no other vehicles or obstacles in the immediate path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered rock formations

events.description: vehicle initiates a turn or drift, causing the camera to swing around to a side view

agents.ego_description: executing a sideways drift or sharp turn, sliding across the snow while the camera captures the vehicle's side profile

entered.detail: dark geometric rock formation appearing on the right side as the vehicle turns

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle begins to turn or drift, the camera smoothly transitions from a rear view to a side profile perspective. The vehicle slides sideways across the snow, revealing its rugged side details and yellow wheels. A dark rock formation comes into view on the right side while the previous left-side formations pass out of frame behind the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a trailing rear perspective to a side profile as a red off-road vehicle navigates a vast, snowy expanse. It begins with the vehicle driving steadily across a flat, bright white field, passing a dark rock formation on the left. As the vehicle begins to drift, the camera smoothly pivots around the chassis to reveal the rugged side details and yellow wheels. The scene then shifts its focus as the initial rock formations disappear behind the vehicle, while a new dark rock formation emerges on the right side of the frame.
